name: Quick n Easy Crock Pot Beef Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut flank steak into 6 portions.
2. In a crock pot, combine meat, onion, green pepper, red pepper, jalapeno, cilantro, garlic, chili powder, cumin, coriander, and salt.
3. Add tomatoes.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or high for 4-5 hours.
5. Remove meat from crock pot and shred.
6. Return shredded meat to the crock pot and stir.
7. To serve, spread tortillas and top with toppings. Roll up the tortilla.
